title: Docs tests and release readiness
objective: Update public documentation and complete release-grade validation for v46.
description: Closes the v46 spec by aligning docs, help, generated guidance, tests, package smoke, and evidence.
parallel_safe_reason: Final validation depends on all previous behavior slices.
must: Update public command docs and generated guidance.
Run focused tests and full test suite.
Run package build and package-installed smoke.
acceptance: Docs match CLI help and behavior.
Generated docs/templates use canonical commands where appropriate.
Full validation passes or failures are documented with blockers.
Spec status and evidence are updated.
tests: package-installed smoke for create-quiver and quiver binaries
validation_hints: Package-installed smoke must verify both create-quiver and quiver binaries.
Keep release evidence concise and command-specific.
